name: @openuidev/mooncode-os-plugin
description: MoonCode plugin that turns agent responses into Generative UI and serves the mooncode-client at /plugins/mooncodeos.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:mooncode --external:mooncode/* --external:node:* --loader:.json=json --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.bundle-ui: cd ../mooncode-client && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm build && shx rm -rf ../mooncode-plugin/static && shx cp -r out ../mooncode-plugin/static
scripts.ci: pnpm lint:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck
